response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent senior roles at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) directly involving the required TypeScript/Node.js stack and AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP). Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices aligns well with the role's emphasis on quality. Some gaps exist around Nest.js specifically and React depth is less prominent than backend work, but overall fit is strong.
strengths: Recent Google role explicitly covers TypeScript/Node.js full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), matching the stack and AI requirement
Deep multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang) and database experience (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) covering required tech breadth
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshops indicate communication skills
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the resume despite being primary stack items
React experience is mentioned only briefly at Meta; frontend depth relative to backend is unclear
No explicit cloud/Kubernetes production experience called out (AWS CDK mentioned but limited GCP/Azure/K8s detail)

key_factors.factor: Seniority and tenure at top-tier companies
